morning_thesis: SPY gapped up ~$9 from Thursday June 12 close (~742) to Monday premarket at 750-752. VIX 16.60 (MID regime, sharply lower than last week's 19.16 — fear fading). Premarket consolidation range 748-752 with PMH 752.09 as first key resistance. No macro events today; FOMC not until Wednesday June 17. Bullish bias conditional on RTH confirming: bull trigger = 752.09 PMH break + 5m close above. Bear pivot = 748.00 PML break + 5m close below + ribbon flip to BEAR. Swarm unavailable (all agents failed — SWARM_CONTEXT_UNAVAILABLE). FOMC Wed creates medium-term uncertainty but today's tape is clean and constructive.

predictions.claim: PMH 752.09 acts as resistance on first RTH approach — SPY reaches 751.50+ in the first hour but fails to close a 5m bar above 752.25 before 10:30 ET
predictions.invalidation: SPY closes a 5m bar above 752.25 before 10:30 ET
predictions.actual: SPY printed 752.71 at first tick 09:39 ET — above 752.25 before 10:30, invalidation triggered on open drive

predictions.claim: Premarket floor 748.00 holds all session — SPY does not close a 5m bar below 748.50 at any point before 15:00 ET
predictions.invalidation: SPY closes a 5m bar below 748.50 before 15:00 ET
predictions.actual: Session low 751.65 — 748.00 level never tested; floor held cleanly all session

predictions.claim: VIX stays below 17.20 all session (keeps bull filter eligible), confirming the fear unwind from last week's 19.16
predictions.invalidation: VIX prints above 17.20 with rising direction at any heartbeat check before 14:00 ET
predictions.actual: VIX fell from 16.60 at open to 16.06 at 12:39 ET, peaked intraday at ~16.36, stayed well below 17.20 all session

predictions.claim: SPY closes the RTH session above 750.00 — the bull continuation holds all day with no bear cascade
predictions.invalidation: Any 5m bar closes below 749.00 during RTH session before 15:50 ET
predictions.actual: Session low 751.65; last observed SPY 754.37 at 15:30 ET ribbon BULL 29c; no bear cascade; held above 750 all session

surprises: Bold entered BULLISH_RECLAIM 752C at 10:24 ET (5 contracts, 2.14 avg) and TP1 filled +74 at 11:32 — EOD free-tier report incorrectly said 0 trades; free-tier model lacks current-position file access
Haiku rate-limit wall activated 13:42 ET and blinded all heartbeat ticks until ~15:30 ET (1h48m blackout) — open runner unmanaged; severity: CRITICAL infrastructure gap
Session ran to 756.68 high (not 753.61 from mid-session review) — strong continuation above PMH all day, no retrace to 752.09 support
Safe account skipped liquidity at 10:42 (753C would exceed 14 daily loss cap) — size cap prevented Safe from participating in the best bull day since return from dark period
lesson: Haiku rate-limit pool exhaustion ("resets 1:30pm MT" = 3:30pm ET) caused 1h48m heartbeat blackout with an open Bold runner — C10 violation. The fix: add a rate-limit detection branch in the heartbeat harness wrapper that switches model to a fallback (Sonnet or a free-tier claude model) when Haiku exit=1 on consecutive ticks, rather than silently failing across the position management window.
tomorrow_hint: TUESDAY pre-FOMC: watch 756.68 high / 752.09 support / 748.00 carry floor | FOMC Wed 13:30-15:00 ET no-trade window | VIX 16.11 bull eligible | expect vol expansion Tue PM
